LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DALE HURLEY, JACQUELINE PHILLIPS, DEDA ENTERPRISES, INC., D B A HOUSE OF CHICKEN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED. THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO GRANT RELIEF IN LIGHT ON DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO ACCOMPANY MOTION WITH A RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P 473(B). SEE COUNTY OF STANISLAUS VS JOHNSON (1996) 43 CAL. APP. 4TH 832,838; PURYEAR VS. STANLEY (1985) 172 CAL. APP 3RD, 291, AT 293 AND 294. IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANT HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED EXCUSABLE NEGLECT OR REASONABLE DILIGENCE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT DALE HURLEY, JACQUELINE PHILLIPS, DEDA ENTERPRISES, INC., D B A HOUSE OF CHICKEN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED. THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO GRANT RELIEF IN LIGHT ON DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO ACCOMPANY MOTION WITH A RESPONSIVE PLEADING AS REQUIRED BY C C P 473(b). SEE COUNTY OF STANISLAUS VS JOHNSON (1996) 43 CAL. APP. 4TH 832,838; PURYEAR VS. STANLEY (1985) 172 CAL. APP 3RD, 291, AT 293 AND 294. IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANT HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED EXCUSABLE NEGLECT OR REASONABLE DILIGENCE. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB/JF)

Off Calendar Jan-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed.
